  <body class="light">
    <div class="workspace">
      <section class="chat-window" id="chat-window">
        <header class="chat-header" id="drag-handle">
          <div class="chat-title">
            <span class="chat-dot"></span>
            <div class="chat-title-text">
              <strong>商旅费控智能体</strong>
              <span>现在拖动的是这个真实聊天窗口</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="chat-actions">
            <button type="button" id="reset-window">复位</button>
          </div>
        </header>
        <div class="chat-body">
          <div id="coze-chat-sdk"></div>
          <div class="resize-tip">右下角可拖动改大小</div>
        </div>
      </section>
    </div>

    <div class="page-tip">
      <strong>当前模式</strong>
      这是嵌入式聊天窗口，不再使用右下角浮球弹窗。桌面端可拖动、可改大小。
    </div>

    <script src="https://lf-cdn.coze.cn/obj/unpkg/flow-platform/chat-app-sdk/1.2.0-beta.19/libs/cn/index.js"></script>
    <script>
      const mountEl = document.getElementById("coze-chat-sdk");
      const chatWindow = document.getElementById("chat-window");
      const dragHandle = document.getElementById("drag-handle");
      const resetButton = document.getElementById("reset-window");
      const desktopMedia = window.matchMedia("(min-width: 769px)");
      const sdk = window.CozeWebSDK || window.CozeWebSDKmain;

      if (!sdk || !sdk.WebChatClient) {
        mountEl.innerHTML =
          '<div style="padding:24px;color:#8b4b15;">Chat SDK 加载失败，请检查网络或浏览器控制台。</div>';
        throw new Error("Coze Chat SDK is not available on window.");
      }

      function clamp(value, min, max) {
        return Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max);
      }

      function syncEmbeddedRoot() {
        const firstChild = mountEl.firstElementChild;
        if (!firstChild) {
          return;
        }

        firstChild.style.width = "100%";
        firstChild.style.height = "100%";
        firstChild.style.maxWidth = "100%";
        firstChild.style.maxHeight = "100%";
      }

      const observer = new MutationObserver(function () {
        syncEmbeddedRoot();
      });

      observer.observe(mountEl, {
        childList: true,
        subtree: true,
      });

      new sdk.WebChatClient({
        config: {
          type: "bot",
          bot_id: "7622561335737532470",
          isIframe: false,
        },
        auth: {
          type: "token",
          token: "pat_orpMRBmtF3AxM0MemoyRUUiIF4BoN1qVmvRyoKAlOcd4Ci3c0jpv9pE5JnT82H1c",
          onRefreshToken: function () {
            return "pat_orpMRBmtF3AxM0MemoyRUUiIF4BoN1qVmvRyoKAlOcd4Ci3c0jpv9pE5JnT82H1c";
          },
        },
        ui: {
          base: {
            layout: "pc",
            lang: "zh-CN",
            zIndex: 1000,
          },
          header: {
            isShow: false,
            isNeedClose: false,
          },
          asstBtn: {
            isNeed: false,
          },
          conversations: {
            isNeed: true,
          },
          footer: {
            isShow: false,
          },
          chatBot: {
            title: "商旅费控智能体",
            uploadable: true,
            width: 430,
            el: mountEl,
            isNeedAddNewConversation: true,
            isNeedFunctionCallMessage: true,
            isNeedQuote: true,
          },
        },
      });

      window.setTimeout(syncEmbeddedRoot, 600);
      window.setTimeout(syncEmbeddedRoot, 1500);
      window.setTimeout(syncEmbeddedRoot, 3000);

      function resetWindow() {
        if (!desktopMedia.matches) {
          chatWindow.style.left = "";
          chatWindow.style.top = "";
          chatWindow.style.right = "";
          chatWindow.style.width = "";
          chatWindow.style.height = "";
          return;
        }

        chatWindow.style.width = "430px";
        chatWindow.style.height = "760px";
        chatWindow.style.left = "";
        chatWindow.style.top = "40px";
        chatWindow.style.right = "40px";
      }

      let dragging = false;
      let offsetX = 0;
      let offsetY = 0;

      function handlePointerDown(event) {
        if (!desktopMedia.matches) {
          return;
        }

        const rect = chatWindow.getBoundingClientRect();
        dragging = true;
        offsetX = event.clientX - rect.left;
        offsetY = event.clientY - rect.top;
        dragHandle.classList.add("dragging");
        chatWindow.style.left = rect.left + "px";
        chatWindow.style.top = rect.top + "px";
        chatWindow.style.right = "auto";
        dragHandle.setPointerCapture(event.pointerId);
      }

      function handlePointerMove(event) {
        if (!dragging || !desktopMedia.matches) {
          return;
        }

        const nextLeft = clamp(event.clientX - offsetX, 12, window.innerWidth - chatWindow.offsetWidth - 12);
        const nextTop = clamp(event.clientY - offsetY, 12, window.innerHeight - chatWindow.offsetHeight - 12);

        chatWindow.style.left = nextLeft + "px";
        chatWindow.style.top = nextTop + "px";
      }

      function stopDragging(event) {
        if (!dragging) {
          return;
        }

        dragging = false;
        dragHandle.classList.remove("dragging");

        if (event && typeof dragHandle.releasePointerCapture === "function") {
          try {
            dragHandle.releasePointerCapture(event.pointerId);
          } catch (error) {
            // Ignore release failures.
          }
        }
      }

      dragHandle.addEventListener("pointerdown", handlePointerDown);
      dragHandle.addEventListener("pointermove", handlePointerMove);
      dragHandle.addEventListener("pointerup", stopDragging);
      dragHandle.addEventListener("pointercancel", stopDragging);
      resetButton.addEventListener("click", resetWindow);

      window.addEventListener("resize", function () {
        syncEmbeddedRoot();

        if (!desktopMedia.matches) {
          chatWindow.style.left = "";
          chatWindow.style.top = "";
          chatWindow.style.right = "";
          return;
        }

        const rect = chatWindow.getBoundingClientRect();
        chatWindow.style.left =
          clamp(rect.left, 12, window.innerWidth - chatWindow.offsetWidth - 12) + "px";
        chatWindow.style.top =
          clamp(rect.top, 12, window.innerHeight - chatWindow.offsetHeight - 12) + "px";
        chatWindow.style.right = "auto";
      });
    </script><div><div id="semi-image-preview-group-d1ay" class="coze-chat-sdk-semi-image-preview-group"></div></div>
  

</body></html>
